cover1: I am a dedicated developer with over 10 years of experience across frontend and backend technologies.
cover2: I graduated in 2015 from the University of Informatic Sciences (UCI) in Havana, Cuba, where I built a strong technical foundation. Since then, I’ve worked with a wide range of technologies, including:
cover3: Frontend: React.js, Next.js, React Native, VueJs, Quasar Framework
cover4: Backend: Node.js, Firebase, Laravel, PHP, Python (Odoo), NestJs, MongoDB
cover5: Throughout my career, I’ve prided myself on being a reliable, responsible developer and a collaborative team player, always striving to deliver high-quality solutions.
cover6: For the past five years, I’ve specialized in modern JavaScript frameworks (React, Next.js) and cloud-based tools like Firebase, but my diverse background allows me to adapt quickly to new challenges.
